esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// Critical: ranges without quorum cannot serve reads or writes
| WHERE metrics.ranges_unavailable IS NOT NULL AND metrics.ranges_unavailable > 0
| STATS unavailable = MAX(metrics.ranges_unavailable)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id, attributes.store
| SORT unavailable DESC
